alkylation concentration: adding iodoacetamide to a final concentration of 10mM
cleavage agent: Trypsin was added to the sample at a 1:200 (w/w) ratio
instrument: A hybrid linear ion trap Fourier transform ion cyclotron resonance mass spectrometer (LTQ FT-ICR MS; Thermo Scientific, Bremen, Germany)
ionization type: an electrospray ionization (ESI) spray voltage of 4.8 kV
labeling: the digested samples were separated using a 60cm × 75μm inner diameter fused silica analytical column packed with ReproSil-Pur C8
reduction reagent: the sample was first reduced by adding TCEP
reduction concentration: adding TCEP to a final concentration of 5mM
